revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == The template will normally be used without parameters. If placed within a portal having a strongly coloured background, it may be necessary to set the text colours. Use {{code|linkcolour}} to override the normal blue colouring of the links, and {{code|textcolour}} to set the colour of the other text.
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}
== See also == {{Portal template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates]] [[Category:Bar-style templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == The template will normally be used without parameters. If placed within a portal having a strongly coloured background, it may be necessary to set the text colours. Use {{code|linkcolour}} to override the normal blue colouring of the links, and {{code|textcolour}} to set the colour of the other text.
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}
== See also == {{Portal template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates]] [[Category:Bar-style templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == The template will normally be used without parameters. If placed within a portal having a strongly coloured background, it may be necessary to set the text colours. Use {{code|linkcolour}} to override the normal blue colouring of the links, and {{code|textcolour}} to set the colour of the other text.
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}
== See also == {{Portal template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates]] [[Category:Bar-style templates]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == The template will normally be used without parameters. If placed within a portal having a strongly coloured background, it may be necessary to set the text colours. Use {{code|linkcolour}} to override the normal blue colouring of the links, and {{code|textcolour}} to set the colour of the other text.
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}
== See also == {{Portal template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates]] [[Category:Bar-style templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == The template will normally be used without parameters. If placed within a portal having a strongly coloured background, it may be necessary to set the text colours. Use {{code|linkcolour}} to override the normal blue colouring of the links, and {{code|textcolour}} to set the colour of the other text.
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == The template will normally be used without parameters. If placed within a portal having a strongly coloured background, it may be necessary to set the text colours. Use {{code|linkcolour}} to override the normal blue colouring of the links, and {{code|textcolour}} to set the colour of the other text.
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == The template will normally be used without parameters. If placed within a portal having a strongly coloured background, it may be necessary to set the text colours. Use {{code|linkcolour}} to override the normal blue colouring of the links, and {{code|textcolour}} to set the colour of the other text.
{{portals|linkcolour=yellow|textcolour=white}}
